name: Log entries must not contain personally identifiable information
description: Structured log entries must not contain PII including email addresses, SSNs, phone numbers, physical addresses, full names, or government-issued identifiers. PII-containing log writes are denied at the logging boundary.

policy.rationale: Logs are often retained long-term, indexed broadly, and accessible to many engineers. PII in logs creates privacy exposure that is difficult to remediate retroactively.
